title: 无标题文章
summary: Trying to figure out how to get Detekt to ignore empty source sets in a KMP project, where it is configured per-module, e.g. if androidMain is empty, a detektAll task will fail with "Provided path '' is empty"
content: Trying to figure out how to get Detekt to ignore empty source sets in a KMP project, where it is configured per-module, e.g. if androidMain is empty, a detektAll task will fail with "Provided path '' is empty"
